scripts.test:services: npm -w services/identity test && npm -w services/payment test && npm -w services/content test && npm -w services/metadata test && npm -w services/royalty test
scripts.dev:services: dotenv -e .env.local -- concurrently -n gateway,content-group,payment-group,social-group "npm -w services/identity run dev" "npm -w services/content run dev:unified" "npm -w services/payment run dev:unified" "npm -w services/messaging run dev:unified"
scripts.dev:services:legacy: dotenv -e .env.local -- concurrently -n identity,payment,content,metadata,royalty,nft,live,achievement,governance,bridge,transcode,search,moderation,messaging,engagement,recommendation "npm -w services/identity run dev" "npm -w services/payment run dev" "npm -w services/content run dev" "npm -w services/metadata run dev" "npm -w services/royalty run dev" "npm -w services/nft run dev" "npm -w services/live run dev" "npm -w services/achievement run dev" "npm -w services/governance run dev" "npm -w services/bridge run dev" "npm -w services/transcode run dev" "npm -w services/search run dev" "npm -w services/moderation run dev" "npm -w services/messaging run dev" "npm -w services/engagement run dev" "npm -w services/recommendation run dev"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n services,web "npm run dev:services" "wait-on http://localhost:8080/health && npm run dev:web"
scripts.restart: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/dev-stop.ps1 -KeepDocker && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/dev-start.ps1 -SkipDocker
